title: CustomModelData
description: Setting a custom model data for items. Use the anvil or command
body:
# About the Plugin

Introducing a plugin that allows you to set Custom Model Data for your items.

# Features

- Commands for working with tags.
- Supports all possible parameter variations.
- Easy to use and configure.

# How to Use 
For anvils, specify all the parameters you want to add in square brackets, separated by spaces or commas.
Examples: "Item name [TAG]", "Item name [1111]", "Item name [TAG, 1333]"

/customModelData <tags> – while holding an item, sets tags for the item.
/customModelInfo – while holding an item, displays all Custom Model Data information in chat.

# Permissions
"customModelData.info" – Permission to use the /customModelInfo command.

"customModelData.command" – Permission to use the /customModelData command.

"customModelData.cmd" – Permission to set Custom Model Data via an anvil.

"customModelData.color" – Permission to set item color via anvil.
